title: As a new visitor, I want to create an account so that I can place orders and track my purchases

acceptance_criteria.given: a visitor submits the registration form with a valid email and password
acceptance_criteria.then: their account is created, they are automatically signed in, and redirected to the homepage

acceptance_criteria.given: a visitor submits a registration form with an email already registered
acceptance_criteria.then: they see: An account with this email already exists — and the form is not cleared

acceptance_criteria.given: a visitor submits a password shorter than 8 characters
acceptance_criteria.then: they see: Password must be at least 8 characters — before any API call is made

acceptance_criteria.given: a visitor submits an invalid email format
acceptance_criteria.then: they see: Please enter a valid email address — before any API call is made
a welcome email is sent to the registered address within 60 seconds

acceptance_criteria.given: 5 or more failed registration attempts are made from the same IP in 15 minutes
acceptance_criteria.then: the response is 429 with: Too many attempts. Please try again in 15 minutes.

non_functional_requirements.performance: Registration API responds in under 500ms at P95
non_functional_requirements.accessibility: Form inputs have associated labels. Error messages linked via aria-describedby.
non_functional_requirements.security: Passwords hashed with bcrypt cost factor 12. Email enumeration prevented. Rate limiting enforced.

definition_of_done: Password hashing verified in unit tests
Rate limiting verified in integration tests
